function_v0.doc:
Execute multiple contract invocations with optimized auth

For single-wallet operations (transfer + swap + fee), only ONE passkey
signature is required because the caller's auth covers all sub-invocations.

For multi-wallet operations (ARBBOT style), separate auth is required
only when from_addr differs from caller.

Arguments:
- caller: The wallet/account calling Router.exec() - must sign
- invocations: Vec of (contract, method, args, can_fail)
function_v0.name: exec
